_comment: AgentContextPack index (design-spec 2.10). Each `areas` entry feeds one generated <state_dir>/contextpacks/<name>.context.md: `name` (the area; slugified into the pack filename), `folio` (the canonical entry-point doc for the area), `binding_docs` (authoritative contracts to read first), `source_roots` (key files/dirs; existence-checked at generation, missing ones flagged), `do_not_create` (existing systems an agent must not duplicate), `gates` (currently active expansion conditions), `verification` (commands to run before pushing). The generator also accepts a manifest snapshot ({"subsystems": [...]}) instead of this file.

areas.name: control-plane
do_not_create: a second GitHub client — app/github.py is the one TTL-cached REST + raw-content client; all live reads go through it
verification: python3 -m pytest tests/ botsite/tests dashboard/tests review/tests -q

areas.name: botsite
do_not_create: a new design system — botsite/static/ds/ (tokens.css + components.css + ds.js) is the shared ds/ program; style new pages with it
any secret-holding or bot-importing code — botsite is public and secret-free by design
verification: python3 -m pytest tests/ botsite/tests dashboard/tests review/tests -q

areas.name: dashboard
do_not_create: any auth gate — the dashboard is public by owner decision (2026-07-09, "Yes drop the auth")
any bot-control write path — the surface is read-only oversight of superbot's committed JSON feeds
verification: python3 -m pytest tests/ botsite/tests dashboard/tests review/tests -q

areas.name: review
do_not_create: runtime network or git reads — the site is network-free at runtime; data is baked by the gen_*.py generators into committed review/data/*.json
verification: python3 -m pytest tests/ botsite/tests dashboard/tests review/tests -q
